item.title: Her spooky vaginosis cleared up
item.description:
Just a quick heads up to fellow Caroline fans who may not have heard about her big announcement yesterday--she's "committing to an 18-year bit": https://youtu.be/nXEkxMT6RgQ
(And an excuse to dump some of my favorite Caroline vids).
#caroline_konstnar

item.title: Curry Bday
item.description:
Happy 78th Birthday!
The first movie I heard your sultry voice...
Loved you from then on
I was so giddy when I saw your name in other movies.
I quote many lines from Clue.
Sexy evil voice
Sorry for the repeat
Best laugh ever!
item.dc:creator: 42QuestQueen4

item.title: Smokey bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
We're on our way to see Connor Price! I drew this for our 9 year old. I can't wait to see my kiddo starstruck. He knows every word to every song. Tonight is going to be a core memory!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax to help celebrate #caturday
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: It sucks that it's this hard to get people to understand, but I did it!
item.description: I have a neurological condition that prevents my brain from producing enough dopamine and serotonin to allow for focus on complex tasks. Music has been shown to cause these chemicals to be produced, and as such it is easier for me to work with an earbud in for me. If course, this sounds a lot better than "I have ADHD and the music makes my brain feel good so I can work harder." Because some people don't believe in ADHD because it's so often over diagnosed.
item.dc:creator: NotaScientologist

item.title: I never heard of him...and fuck, I think he deserves to be remembered!
item.description: https://www.irishtimes.com/life-and-style/people/richard-green-obituary-psychiatrist-lawyer-and-lgbt-rights-trailblazer-1.3864553 It's an old story, but what he did was amazing and I think people should know about him!

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.40 FULL SERVICE

ARTIST: GLEN BROGAN
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Johnny Cash - Folsom Prison Blues YouTube: https://youtu.be/AeZRYhLDLeU?si=a8PHONwxOoSneLTa Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0LTSNmOLBt25GMjHlxp9OR?si=41fe389693794ab5
毒瘤
Dave Bardin
Buzelli
Micah Ulrich
Zachery Ashton
Chloe Veillard
One Pixel Brush
Alexander Mandradjiev
Anh Ren
Guillem H. Pongiluppi
Huleeb
Fernanda Suarez
ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1180 (toys in a line)
item.description:
Morning again. Coffee is in my cup, Lebanese jazz playing, Pippin is preening my hair. Let's get this bread.
This.
Well, what am I supposed to do, then?
I can't wait for monsoon. I'm pretty sure we're done with the winter/ spring storms early this year.
I share to make myself feel less alone, frankly, and so others know they're not alone either.
This just makes me think of Troodontid dinosaurs at night.....
Yup.
Yuuuuuuuuuùuùp
"Can. Can we do that?"
I didn't ask to be here but now I am.
Bliss.
I'm fancy trash, like old bronze coins.
What would a dump of mine be without an Ea-Naşir. reference
Our Wizard just learned Fireball
It also seems to be going downhill. How exciting!
Unpopular Theological Opinion: When Jesus said, "I came not to bring peace, but the sword," He meant that we must take the Kingdom of God by force from those who would deny it to us: the elite, the wealthy, the Eartly powers.
Yup! Also bills must be paid on the Big Screen.
I have a picture of me in eyeliner from my sophomore year of college and ngl, even I think I look hot in it.
Banishing crystals
A wild ride.
Be your own light..
Hah
Fuck yeah I'd go.
Yup
Also you can ripen fruit faster with ethylene.
Hi it's the Autism. Here are all my dinosaurs in corners of the room.
It Is what it is.
I'm down for this..
Hahahahaaha.
So is imgur.
MOOD.
A prayer for idiots.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Raspberry noises] good boy. You wanna [indecipherable]? Oh Pippin. Ohmygawd."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
